case_title: JAIRO GARCIA VS. SHI LEI ET AL

docket_entries.description: THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE PER REQUEST OF THE PLAINTIFF. PLAINTIFF JAIRO GARCIA IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT SHI LEI IS NOT PRESENT. DEFENDANT VESTA ASSET MANAGEMENT IS NOT PRESENT. COURT NOTICE SENT TO THE DEFENDANTS AT THE REQUEST OF THE PLAINTIFF. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: PANG LY; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED. (D506)
